appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Theme follows the vault; language is stored on this device.
appearance.theme.title: Theme
appearance.language.title: Language
appearance.language.description: Language is stored on this device and does not follow the vault.
backlinks.title: Backlinks
ai.title: AI
ai.description: Manage model profiles shared by Agent, SQL Copilot, and note assistants.
ai.enabled.label: Enable AI
ai.enabled.description: Turn off to disable all AI features. When on, the active profile below is used.
ai.provider.label: Provider
ai.provider.description: Disabled keeps all AI features off. OpenAI-compatible works with local gateways and hosted APIs.
ai.profile.label: Profile
ai.profile.description: Save multiple vendor / model / key setups and switch them in the Agent panel.
ai.profile.emptyHint: Add a model profile on the left.
ai.profile.name: Display name
ai.profile.nameDescription: Shown in the left list and the Agent panel switcher.
ai.profile.draftNew: Draft created — fill fields and click Save profile.
ai.profile.baseUrlRequired: Custom vendors require a Base URL.
ai.vendor.label: API vendor
ai.vendor.description: Built-in vendors only need a key; Custom accepts any OpenAI-compatible gateway.
ai.model.label: Model
ai.model.description: Model name passed to the vendor.
ai.contextWindow.label: Context window
ai.contextWindow.description: Model context window size in tokens. Used for Agent compaction budgeting.
ai.baseUrl.label: Base URL
ai.baseUrl.description: Chat Completions endpoint root, for example https://api.openai.com/v1.
ai.apiKey.label: API key
ai.apiKey.description: Stored in device-local safeStorage — never in notes or Git.
ai.policy.title: Privacy & Agent
ai.policy.description: These policies apply to every profile.
ai.privacy.title: Privacy
ai.privacy.description: Stela sends only capped, redacted context. Full result sets are never sent.
ai.samples.label: Send result samples
ai.samples.description: Allow sampled rows from the current result to enter the AI prompt.
ai.maxRows.label: Sample rows
ai.maxRows.description: Maximum sampled rows per AI request.
ai.status.needsKey: This profile still needs an API key.
ai.modal.description: AI responses are rendered as Markdown and never applied automatically.
ai.runsql.rewritePlaceholder: Optional: describe how to change this SQL. Leave empty to fix syntax or improve performance.
ai.runsql.askPlaceholder: Ask a question about this SQL…
ai.runsql.rewriteHint: Type @ to reference table schemas. Shift+Enter for a new line.
ai.runsql.askHint: Type @ to reference table schemas. Shift+Enter for a new line.
ai.runsql.noSqlReturned: AI did not return a SQL block.
ai.runsql.fixTitle: AI fix: rewrite SQL using the error message
ai.editor.title: Write or rewrite analysis with AI
ai.editor.prompt: Choose AI action: write-analysis, rewrite-selection, or add-limitations
ai.agent.title: Agent
ai.agent.description: Tuning knobs for the harness agent loop (see the Agent panel).
ai.agent.maxIterations.label: Max iterations
ai.agent.maxIterations.description: Hard cap on model turns per agent run; default 200 (max 10000).
ai.agent.wallClockMs.label: Wall-clock limit (ms)
ai.agent.wallClockMs.description: Aborts the run if it exceeds this duration; default 300000 (5 minutes).
ai.agent.allowMutations.label: Allow mutating SQL (with confirmation)
ai.agent.allowMutations.description: When off, the agent blocks INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL outright. When on, it asks for your approval before running them.
agent.panel.title: Agent
agent.panel.empty: Ask the agent to analyze notes, query data, or draft a summary.
agent.panel.placeholder: Ask the agent to do something…
backlinks.empty: No other notes link to this file yet.
blockResult.detailFallback.single: Full results were not found in the local cache or synced history log. Showing only the first row saved in this note's detail block.
blockResult.detailFallback.multiple: Full results were not found in the local cache or synced history log. Showing only the first row saved in this note's detail block (originally {{count}} rows).

commandPalette.placeholder: Type a command or file name…

commandPalette.insertRunSql.hint: Insert an executable SQL block at the cursor

commandPalette.openAgent.label: Open agent

commandPalette.chooseVault.label: Choose / switch vault
commandPalette.hiddenFiles: Showing the first {{shown}} files. Type to search the remaining {{hidden}} files.
connectionPicker.title: Choose database connection
connections.field.name: Name
connections.frontmatterHint: Reference it in note frontmatter with
connections.deleteConfirm: Delete connection '{{name}}'? This cannot be undone.
connections.autoSaveHint: Changes are saved and tested automatically
connections.credential.encrypted: Connection password is encrypted with {{backend}} as an __enc: value and can only be decrypted on this device. Other fields, such as host and user, are still stored as plain text in stela-connections.json.
connections.credential.plain: OS keychain is unavailable ({{backend}}). password will be stored as __plain: plain text in stela-connections.json. Use only locally, or confirm that the system keyring service is running.
connections.config.title: Config
connections.config.formUnavailableTitle: This connector does not provide a usable schema
connections.config.noSchema: This connector does not provide a recognizable JSON Schema. Edit in JSON view only.
connections.missingSecrets: This device has not saved these secrets: {{fields}}. Secrets are encrypted per device and cannot be decrypted across devices. Fill and save them once on this device.
connections.autocomplete.title: Autocomplete
connections.autocomplete.refreshTitle: Clear the cache; reload it the next time RunSQL triggers autocomplete
connections.autocomplete.idle: Not loaded (RunSQL will load autocomplete automatically)
connections.schema.title: Schema
connections.schema.syncTitle: Fetch SHOW CREATE TABLE for all schemas and tables, then write into {{dir}}
editor.runAll.empty: This file has no RunSQL blocks
editor.runAll.title: Rerun all RunSQL blocks in this file
editor.external.removed: This file was removed on disk.
exportNote.title: Export as Markdown
exportNote.noRunsql: This note has no RunSQL blocks. The original Markdown will be exported as-is.
exportNote.rowCap.label: Rows per result block
exportNote.runScope.label: Result scope
exportNote.includeDiffSummary: Append a diff summary against the previous version
exportNote.description: <detail> metadata will be replaced with Markdown tables. The original note will not be modified.
exportNote.status.failedBlocks: ({{count}} blocks are missing data; original <detail> blocks were kept)
fileTree.deleteConfirm: Move '{{name}}' to the trash? You can restore it from the system trash.
fileTree.moveIntoChild: You cannot move a folder into its own subfolder.
fileTree.importPartialFailed:
Import finished, but some files failed:

runHistory.refreshFailed: Refresh failed. See the error below.
runHistory.empty: No SQL has been run in this vault yet
runHistory.missingPathTitle: This old run did not record a file path and cannot be opened
runTabs.needTwo: At least two successful runs are required

search.start: Type a keyword to start searching
search.stale: Vault changed. Results may be stale.
search.overflow: {{count}} more hits are hidden. Use a more specific keyword.
sqlSearch.stale: Index updated. Results may be stale.
sqlSearch.columnDisabledRead: Column filter isn't supported for reads yet
sidebar.empty: Open a folder as your Stela vault.
dock.version.title: Stela {{version}}
schema.addConnectionHint: Add a connection in Connections to browse schema
schema.refreshFailed: Refresh failed. See the error below.
welcome.title: Welcome to Stela
welcome.slogan: Run SQL in Markdown. Track data in Stela.
welcome.noVault.title: No vault opened yet
welcome.noVault.description: Choose a local folder as your note vault, or try the demo vault first. Stela will seed an example note in the location you choose.
welcome.fileMissing:
File no longer exists and was removed from recent files:
{{path}}
welcome.demo.pickParent: Choose a parent directory for Demo Vault
demoVault.noteIntro: This is a demo vault. Stela is a desktop data notebook for **Markdown + SQL**. You can place RunSQL code blocks between regular Markdown paragraphs, execute queries, and keep the result close to the text.
security.credentials.title: Credential Storage
security.privacy.title: Data Privacy
security.privacy.results: SQL results are stored in the local SQLite file at the vault root, .stela.sqlite, and are never uploaded to any server. Notes (.md) keep only a detail summary: first-row preview, row count, and elapsed time. The full result set stays in SQLite.
security.privacy.credentials: When connection config is written to stela-connections.json, the password field is encrypted by Electron safeStorage into an __enc: base64 value. If encryption is unavailable, it falls back to a __plain: value and the UI shows a warning banner. All connection write paths redact sensitive fields before writing main-process logs.
security.credentials.okBody: Current backend: {{backend}}. password fields in stela-connections.json are encrypted by the OS credential store as __enc: base64 values and can only be decrypted by the current local user.
security.credentials.plainTitle: Credential encryption is unavailable; passwords are stored as plain text
security.credentials.plainBody: safeStorage.isEncryptionAvailable() returned false ({{backend}}). password fields are written to stela-connections.json as __plain: plain text. Use only locally and avoid cloud sync, or make sure the system keyring service is configured correctly. On Linux this is usually libsecret / GNOME Keyring.
security.credentials.errorTitle: Failed to read credential storage status
settings.title: Settings
updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Check GitHub Releases for macOS and Windows updates. Downloads and restarts are always explicit.
updates.currentVersion.description: The installed Stela build on this device.
updates.status.title: Update status
updates.status.disabled: Auto update is only available in packaged macOS and Windows builds.
updates.status.downloaded: Update downloaded. Restart Stela to install it.
updates.lastChecked.never: Not checked yet in this session.
execution.title: Execution
execution.onError.description: What Run All should do when a block fails.
execution.maxRows.description: Maximum result rows Stela saves/displays. Stela does not rewrite SQL or append LIMIT automatically. 0 = unlimited.
execution.advanced.title: Advanced (M5)
execution.advanced.description: Concurrency, per-query timeout, retries, and write policy will be enabled in later versions.
execution.concurrency.description: How many blocks Run All executes at the same time.
execution.timeout.description: Timeout for a single SQL execution, in seconds.
execution.writePolicy.description: Whether INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE statements are allowed.
ui.resultPageSize.description: Rows loaded when a BlockResult table first opens or when Load more is clicked.
ui.resultPageSize.hint: Changes apply to newly opened results. Already expanded blocks are not affected.
ui.editorWidth.title: Editor width
ui.editorWidth.description: Layout width for the Markdown editor body.
ui.editorWidth.narrowHint: ~920px centered with side margins, good for reading and writing long notes
ui.editorWidth.wideHint: Use all available width, good for wide screens and table-heavy notes
ui.editorWidth.hint: The change applies immediately to all open Markdown editors.
persistence.location.title: Storage Location
persistence.cleanup.title: Cleanup Policy
persistence.cleanup.windowDescription: Run records older than this window will be deleted the next time cleanup runs.
persistence.cleanup.description: Run cleanup once with the current policy. This does not affect the latest run records or visible results.
persistence.cleanup.never: The current policy is Never, so cleanup was not run.
git.notice.remoteAddedWithHistory: Remote added. Remote history was detected; pull first is recommended.
git.notice.rebuilt: Cache rebuilt from logs: imported {{count}} records
git.notice.exported: Exported {{count}} history records to the current device log
git.notice.exportEmpty: No history needs to be exported
git.notice.cleanupEmpty: No history older than {{days}} days to clean
git.notice.cleanupDone: Cleaned {{lines}} history lines (rewrote {{rewritten}} log files, deleted {{files}} segment files, and cleared {{runs}} local cache records)
git.repo.title: Repository
git.repo.description: Use Git to manage notes (Markdown) and execution history JSONL. Local caches such as .stela.sqlite are never committed.
git.enabled.description: Status bar badges, automatic sync, and command palette actions depend on this switch.
git.repo.ready: Current vault is a Git repository
git.repo.notRepo: Current vault is not a Git repository yet
git.remote.title: Add Remote
git.author.title: Commit Identity
git.author.name: Name
git.automation.title: Automation
git.automation.description: Automatic commit / push / pull in the background reduces manual sync work.
git.autoCommit.description: After edits are saved or execution completes, commit a checkpoint after about 2 minutes of idle time.
git.autoPush.description: Push to the remote after an automatic commit.
git.autoPull.description: Pull from the remote at an interval and merge execution history.
git.device.title: Device and Execution History
git.device.description: Each device writes its own history_{slug}.jsonl. After Git sync, local SQLite merges the records for querying.
git.slug.title: Device slug
git.slug.description: Used in this device's log file name. Each device must use a different slug to avoid write conflicts.
git.sources.title: Log sources
git.sources.empty: No execution history log files yet
git.cleanup.title: Clean Old History
git.cleanup.description: Delete old JSONL records and local SQLite cache rows by date. A single log file larger than 64 MB is also rotated into segment files.
git.badge.disabledTitle: Git is disabled - open Git settings
git.badge.cleanTitle: Git: working tree clean - click to sync
git.badge.notRepoTitle: Current vault is not a Git repository - click to initialize
git.badge.conflictTitle: {{count}} conflicts need resolution - click to resolve
git.syncDialog.title: Git Sync
git.syncDialog.notRepo.description: The current vault is not a Git repository yet. Initialize it to manage notes and execution history with Git.
git.syncDialog.commitPlaceholder: Commit message (leave empty to use an automatic checkpoint message)
git.syncDialog.conflict.description: Pull produced conflicts. Choose which side to keep for each file, then commit after all conflicts are resolved.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.modHint: Mod is ⌘ on macOS and Ctrl on other platforms.
shortcuts.global.title: Global
shortcuts.global.description: Available anywhere in the app, including inputs and the editor.
shortcuts.global.newNote: Create a new Stela note in the current vault
shortcuts.global.search: Switch to Sidebar Search and focus the input
shortcuts.global.addToChat: Add the current editor selection or RunSQL block to Agent chat
shortcuts.global.runBlock: Inside a RunSQL block: run the current block (works from CM, Run button, or result table focus)
shortcuts.editor.title: Editor (RunSQL Code Blocks)
shortcuts.editor.description: Available when focus is inside the CodeMirror editor and handled by the CM6 keymap.
shortcuts.editor.run: RunSQL block: run SQL (same as clicking Run); other code blocks: exit the code block and create a new paragraph
shortcuts.editor.refresh: RunSQL block: force reload the current runId result table (CM only)
shortcuts.editor.format: RunSQL block: format the full SQL block (uppercase keywords, 2-space indentation)
shortcuts.context.title: Code Block Context Menu
shortcuts.context.description: Available from the context menu on RunSQL and regular code blocks.
shortcuts.context.refresh: Refresh result (RunSQL only; disabled if no result yet, same as Mod+R)
shortcuts.context.addToChat: Add selected text or this code block to Agent chat
shortcuts.context.copy: Copy SQL / copy code depending on block type
plugins.title: Connector Plugins
plugins.description: Manage registered connectors. module plugins are in-process JavaScript modules installed under {path}; they run with full privileges and are fully trusted once installed. subprocess plugins communicate with the main process over stdio JSON-RPC. Both are isolated per vault.
plugins.moduleInstall.title: Install Module Plugin
plugins.moduleInstall.warning: module plugins run in the main process with full Node/Electron privileges and are fully trusted once installed, similar to VSCode extensions. Only install sources you trust.
plugins.moduleInstall.noBundled: No bundled plugins are available. They may not have been packaged in this build.
plugins.moduleInstall.localHint: Choose a plugin package directory containing plugin.json and built dist/index.cjs.
plugins.selectPrompt: Select a plugin on the left to view details
plugins.moduleWarning: module plugins run in the main process with full Node/Electron privileges and are fully trusted once installed. Only install sources you trust; use subprocess plugins for untrusted code.
plugins.stderr.title: Recent stderr (up to 200 lines)
plugins.stderr.empty: (No logs yet. The subprocess has not written stderr or has not started.)
plugins.lifecycle.stopTitle: Stop subprocess (next RPC will still start it automatically)
plugins.lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
plugins.uninstall.confirm: Uninstall plugin "{{kind}}"? Connections that use it will no longer run.
plugins.install.title: Install Connector Plugin
plugins.install.description: Choose an executable that speaks the stdio JSON-RPC v1 protocol. The main process will spawn it and wait for the first hello line to register its kind.
plugins.install.env: Environment variables (one KEY=VALUE per line, optional)
errors.noVault: Open a vault before using this feature.
errors.unknownKind: This connector kind is not installed in the current vault.
connections.dialog.title: Connections
connections.dialog.description: Configure connections for RunSQL blocks (matches frontmatter connection_name).
persistence.vault.label: Vault
tabSwitcher.title: Switch tab
blockResult.hint.notRun: Not run yet. Click Run to execute the query.
blockResult.hint.noResultSet: This run returned no result set (possibly a mutation).
blockResult.hint.selectCompare: Select baseline and current runs to compare.
